title: File Information and Checks
description: Check if a file exists, get file size, permissions, and more.

slides.title: Checking File Existence
Using file_exists and is_file
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$path = 'data.txt';
if (file_exists($path)) {
    if (is_file($path)) {
        echo "$path is a file.";
    } elseif (is_dir($path)) {
        echo "$path is a directory.";
    }
} else {
    echo "$path does not exist.";
}
?>

slides.title: File Size and Modification Time
Example: File Info
slides.codeSnippet:
"; echo "Size: " . filesize($file) . " bytes
"; echo "Last modified: " . date('Y-m-d H:i:s', filemtime($file)) . "
"; echo "Permissions: " . substr(sprintf('%o', fileperms($file)), -4) . "
"; } else { echo "File not found."; } ?>
